workflow.name: ZooKeeper HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate ZooKeeper HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare ZooKeeper inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/zookeeper-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[zookeeper]
10.31.130.11 role=zookeeper name=zookeeper-01
10.31.130.12 role=zookeeper name=zookeeper-02
10.31.130.13 role=zookeeper name=zookeeper-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install ZooKeeper container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/zookeeper-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: zookeeper
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/zookeeper-inventory.ini /tmp/zookeeper-runtime.yml

data.label: Render ZooKeeper cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/zookeeper-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: zookeeper
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/zookeeper
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/zookeeper/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            zookeeper:
              image: zookeeper:3.9
              container_name: octastack-zookeeper
              restart: unless-stopped
              ports:
                - "2181:2181"
              volumes:
                - data:/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy ZooKeeper cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/zookeeper-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/zookeeper/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/zookeeper/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/zookeeper/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/zookeeper-inventory.ini /tmp/zookeeper-deploy.yml

data.label: Document ZooKeeper topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/zookeeper-topology.md <<'EOF'
# ZooKeeper HA topology

Members:
- zookeeper-01: 10.31.130.11 (zookeeper)
- zookeeper-02: 10.31.130.12 (zookeeper)
- zookeeper-03: 10.31.130.13 (zookeeper)

This example deploys one ZooKeeper container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/zookeeper-topology.md

data.label: Validate ZooKeeper cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/zookeeper-inventory.ini zookeeper -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'

data.label: ZooKeeper HA health check
data.command: docker exec octastack-zookeeper zkServer.sh status || true
